streamSelectorQuestions.text: I enjoy solving mathematical puzzles and equations.
I like reading about business strategies and market trends.
I enjoy creative writing, painting or music.
I am fascinated by how machines and technology work.
I enjoy managing money, budgeting, and financial planning.
I like debating, discussing social issues and current affairs.
I enjoy conducting science experiments and lab work.
I am interested in learning about stock markets and investments.
I enjoy learning new languages and literature.
I love solving complex logic and reasoning problems.

FA.text: I enjoy drawing, sketching, or painting in my free time.
I appreciate visiting art galleries and museums.
I like designing things — posters, logos, or crafts.

PA.text: I enjoy singing, dancing, or acting on stage.
I like watching and analysing performances (theatre, dance, music).
I enjoy expressing myself through creative performances.

MT.text: I enjoy assembling, repairing, or building things.
I am curious about how machines and gadgets work internally.
I like working with tools, electronics, or mechanical devices.

ME.text: I prefer tasks that require careful attention to detail.
I enjoy organizing files, data, or schedules systematically.
I like following step-by-step procedures to complete work.

PI.text: I enjoy convincing others and presenting ideas persuasively.
I like leading group discussions and team activities.
I am comfortable negotiating and influencing people's decisions.

SO.text: I enjoy volunteering and contributing to social causes.
I like helping others solve their personal problems.
I feel satisfied when I make a positive impact on society.

WN.text: I enjoy working with numbers, statistics, and calculations.
I like solving mathematical puzzles and brain teasers.
I find it satisfying to analyse numerical data and patterns.

RA.text: I enjoy conducting experiments and testing hypotheses.
I like reading about scientific discoveries and research.
I am curious about why things work the way they do.

LU.text: I enjoy reading books, articles, and essays.
I like writing stories, poems, or articles.
I enjoy learning new languages and their grammar.

OS.text: I enjoy playing outdoor sports and physical activities.
I like trekking, camping, and adventure activities.
I prefer being outdoors rather than sitting at a desk.

SA.text: In the sequence: A1B, C2D, E3F, G4H — what comes next?
If APPLE is coded as 14423, what is the code for PALE?
How many triangles are in this figure: A square with both diagonals drawn?

NC.text: If 3/4 of a number is 60, what is the number?

MA.text: A lever with the fulcrum in the middle — if you push one side down, the other side:
Which simple machine is a ramp?
Gears that mesh together rotate in:

NA.text: A train travels 120 km in 2 hours. What is its speed?
If 5 workers can complete a job in 12 days, how many days will 10 workers take?
A shopkeeper buys an item for ₹200 and sells it for ₹250. What is the profit percentage?

VA.text: Fill in the blank: The scientist ___ a new theory about gravity.

LA.text: All roses are flowers. Some flowers are red. Which is true?
If A > B, B > C, and C > D, then:

SP.text: If a cube is painted red on all faces and cut into 27 small cubes, how many have exactly 2 faces painted?
Which shape do you get when you unfold a cylinder?
Mirror image of 'AMBULANCE' when written reversed reads as:

careers.title: Software Engineering
careers.summary: Design and build software applications, websites, and systems.
careers.educationPath: B.Tech (CSE/IT) via JEE/MHT-CET or BCA + MCA

careers.title: Medicine (MBBS)
careers.summary: Diagnose and treat illnesses. Become a doctor or medical specialist.

careers.title: Architecture
careers.summary: Design buildings, spaces, and structures combining art with engineering.

careers.title: Data Science
careers.summary: Analyse complex data to help organizations make better decisions.
careers.educationPath: B.Tech/B.Sc (CS/Stats) + M.Sc/PG Diploma in Data Science

careers.title: Chartered Accountancy
careers.summary: Audit, tax planning, financial consulting, and accounting expertise.

careers.title: Business Management (MBA)
careers.summary: Lead organizations, manage teams, and drive business strategy.

careers.title: Banking & Finance
careers.summary: Work in banks, investment firms, insurance, and financial institutions.
careers.educationPath: B.Com/BBA + MBA Finance or Banking exams (IBPS/SBI)

careers.title: Fine Arts & Design
careers.summary: Create visual art, illustrations, graphic designs, and multimedia content.
careers.educationPath: BFA/B.Des (NID/NIFT entrance) or B.A. Fine Arts

careers.title: Journalism & Mass Communication
careers.summary: Report news, create media content, and communicate stories to the public.
careers.educationPath: BJMC/BA Journalism → Masters in Mass Communication

careers.title: Teaching & Education
careers.summary: Shape young minds as a teacher, professor, or education administrator.
careers.educationPath: BA/B.Sc + B.Ed or Integrated B.Ed programs

careers.title: Law
careers.summary: Practice law, advocate for justice, and provide legal counsel.
careers.educationPath: CLAT/LSAT → BA LLB (5 yrs) or LLB (3 yrs after graduation)

careers.title: Psychology & Counselling
careers.summary: Understand human behavior and provide mental health support.
careers.educationPath: BA/B.Sc Psychology → MA/M.Sc Psychology → RCI license

careers.title: Athlete / Sports
careers.summary: Compete professionally in sports or work in sports management and coaching.
careers.educationPath: Sports academies, B.P.Ed, Sports Management courses

careers.title: Civil Services (IAS/IPS)
careers.summary: Serve the nation in administrative, police, or foreign services.
careers.educationPath: Any graduation + UPSC CSE preparation (2-3 yrs)
